description: High-priority PRD for skimmd — native macOS markdown editor built with Tauri v2 + React + TipTap

issues.title: Dirty indicator on unsaved tabs
issues.description: Show a visual dot on tabs with unsaved changes so users know which files are modified.
issues.problem: No way to tell which tabs have unsaved edits. Users might close a tab or quit without realizing changes haven't been written to disk.
requirements: Add dirty boolean to Tab type in tabStore
Set dirty=true when content diverges from last saved
Set dirty=false after auto-save completes
Render a dot (•) next to the tab filename when dirty
Use subtle accent color — not red, since auto-save handles it
acceptance_criteria: Dot appears within 100ms of first edit

issues.title: Widen content area
issues.description: Editor content is constrained to ~70ch, wasting screen space. Widen default and ensure tables/code blocks use available width.
issues.problem: Tables, code blocks, and long paragraphs feel cramped. Large screens show mostly empty whitespace.
requirements: Increase default max-width from 70ch to ~900px
Tables and code blocks should use full available width
Outline panel stays fixed on right without overlap
Content remains centered and readable
acceptance_criteria: Tables render without horizontal scroll in most cases

issues.title: Source mode syntax highlighting and line numbers
issues.description: Replace the plain textarea source view with a proper code editor that has markdown syntax highlighting and line numbers.
issues.problem: Raw markdown is a plain unstyled textarea. Headers, bold, links, code fences all look identical. No line numbers for navigation.
requirements: Replace textarea with CodeMirror 6 or lightweight alternative
Markdown syntax highlighting: headings, bold/italic, links, code fences, lists, blockquotes
Line numbers in gutter
Light and dark theme support
Preserve auto-save on content changes
Maintain Cmd+/ toggle
acceptance_criteria: Line numbers visible in left gutter
No perf degradation on files up to 10k lines
Content syncs correctly back to WYSIWYG

issues.title: Code block copy button
issues.description: Add a one-click copy button to fenced code blocks.
issues.problem: Users must manually select and copy code block text. Tedious for multi-line blocks and easy to miss characters.
requirements: Copy icon button in top-right of each fenced code block
Appears on hover
Copies raw code text to clipboard
Visual feedback: icon changes to checkmark for 1.5s
Only on fenced blocks, not inline code
acceptance_criteria: Copies exact code without extra whitespace
Does not interfere with code editing
Works for all languages including mermaid source

issues.title: Undo/redo buttons in toolbar
issues.description: Add visible undo/redo buttons. Currently only Cmd+Z / Cmd+Shift+Z work with no visual affordance.
issues.problem: Users who don't know shortcuts have no way to undo. Toolbar should expose all critical actions.
requirements: Add Undo and Redo buttons at left side of toolbar
Use Undo2/Redo2 icons from lucide-react
Disable when nothing to undo/redo (greyed out)
Tooltip shows shortcut: 'Undo (Cmd+Z)'
Use TipTap editor.can().undo() / .redo() for state

issues.title: Find and replace in document
issues.description: Extend the existing Cmd+F search to include replace. Currently find-only with no replace capability.
issues.problem: Renaming terms, fixing repeated typos, or updating text across a document requires manually finding and editing each occurrence.
requirements: Add replace input below search input in SearchBar
Cmd+H opens search with replace visible, Cmd+F opens without
Replace button: replace current match and advance
Replace All button: replace all matches at once
Show match count (already partial)
Preserve case-sensitive toggle
Entire replace operation undoable with Cmd+Z
acceptance_criteria: Cmd+H opens with replace field visible
Replace replaces current match and moves to next
Replace All shows count in toast
Replace field hides when not needed
